design_philosophy.core_loop: Pitch selection and batting timing against AI opponents across multiple innings and games
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Predicting pitcher intentions and executing well-timed swings; managing team composition and strategy
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Managing and playing as a professional baseball team with roster customization and progression through seasons
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Emphasis on arcade-style baseball accessibility with gameplay-first design; reviewers noted strong core mechanics despite graphical limitations. Team customization allowed player expression in squad construction.

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Team editing and roster customization suggests adjustable challenge through squad composition; standard baseball game modes imply selectable difficulty levels typical of sports games

progression.upgrade_system: Team roster editing and player selection mechanics
replayability_hooks: Multiple professional teams available for play
Full team customization and editing features
Ryne Sandberg sponsorship content in NA version

world_building_techniques: Professional team branding and theming (Amoebas, Buzzards, Cyclops, etc.)

faction_indicators: 12 distinct professional teams with unique identities
Geographic representation across US regions and Hawaii
environmental_storytelling: Team names and logos establish implicit regional identities
Stadium and crowd design (noted as inconsistent in reviews) suggests location differentiation
